tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Would + Ought To + Dare.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Would + Ought To + Dare का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Would you help me? I would go there every day before. We ought to respect our parents. You ought to tell the truth. He does not dare to say this.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Would + Ought To + Dare.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Would + Ought To + Dare का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Would you talk to me? I would not do this before. We ought to follow the rules. Do you dare to talk to him? I would like this.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "तुम्हें ईमानदार रहना चाहिए।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "You ought to tell the truth yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: You ought to tell the truth.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Would + Ought To + Dare.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Would + Ought To + Dare का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Would you eat this food? We ought to fulfill our responsibility. How would I know? He did not dare to do this.
